title: anthemis plutonia var. plutonia
intro: Anthemis plutonia var. plutonia, also known as the Chamonix or Mountain Chrysanthemum, is a plant species within the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to the European Alps. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Anthemis plutonia var. plutonia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate respiratory problems, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and skin irritations.
